title: Crop Yield Loss Analyzer
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify yield losses, identify hidden loss drivers, and suggest corrective actions based on ISO, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tohum genetiği ve yerel potansiyele dayalı teorik maksimum verim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Theoretischer Maximalertrag basierend auf Saatgutgenetik und lokalem Potenzial.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement théorique maximal basé sur la génétique des semences et le potentiel local.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento teórico máximo basado en la genética de la semilla y el potencial local.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى عائد نظري بناءً على وراثة البذور والإمكانات المحلية.

inputs.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasatta ölçülen verim, kayıp hesaplaması için temel olarak kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener Ertrag bei der Ernte, als Basis für die Verlustberechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement mesuré à la récolte, utilisé comme base pour le calcul des pertes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento medido en la cosecha, utilizado como línea base para el cálculo de pérdidas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المحصول المُقاس عند الحصاد، يُستخدم كخط أساس لحساب الخسائر.

inputs.label: Harvest Loss (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasat işlemleri sırasında kaybedilen ürün yüzdesi (dökülme, başlık kaybı vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der während der Erntevorgänge verlorenen Ernte (Ausfall, Schneidwerksverlust usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de culture perdu lors des opérations de récolte (égrenage, perte à la barre de coupe, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de cultivo perdido durante las operaciones de cosecha (desgrane, pérdida en cabezal, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المحصول المفقود أثناء عمليات الحصاد (تساقط الحبوب، فقدان الرأس، إلخ).

inputs.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
inputs.businessContext: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasat sonrası elleçleme, depolama ve nakliye sırasındaki kayıplar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verluste bei Handhabung, Lagerung und Transport nach der Ernte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pertes lors de la manutention, du stockage et du transport après la récolte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdidas durante el manejo, almacenamiento y transporte después de la cosecha.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الخسائر أثناء المناولة والتخزين والنقل بعد الحصاد.

inputs.label: Field Condition
inputs.businessContext: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürün tekdüzeliğini ve kayıp potansiyelini etkileyen genel tarla durumu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzustand des Feldes, der die Gleichmäßigkeit der Ernte und das Verlustpotenzial beeinflusst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: État général du champ affectant l'uniformité de la culture et le potentiel de perte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Condición general del campo que afecta la uniformidad del cultivo y el potencial de pérdida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حالة الحقل العامة التي تؤثر على تجانس المحصول واحتمالية الفقد.

inputs.label: Irrigation Type
inputs.businessContext: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sulama yöntemi su stresini ve verim tutarlılığını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Bewässerungsmethode beeinflusst Wasserstress und Ertragskonsistenz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La méthode d'irrigation influence le stress hydrique et la régularité du rendement.
businessContext_i18n.es: El método de riego influye en el estrés hídrico y la consistencia del rendimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طريقة الري تؤثر على الإجهاد المائي وثباتية المحصول.

inputs.label: Pest Pressure (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zararlı istilası seviyesinin subjektif derecelendirmesi (0 = yok, 10 = şiddetli).
businessContext_i18n.de: Subjektive Bewertung des Schädlingsbefalls (0 = kein, 10 = schwer).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation subjective du niveau d'infestation parasitaire (0 = aucun, 10 = sévère).
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación subjetiva del nivel de infestación de plagas (0 = ninguna, 10 = severa).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقدير شخصي لمستوى الإصابة بالآفات (0 = لا يوجد، 10 = شديد).

inputs.label: Disease Index (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hastalık şiddetinin subjektif derecelendirmesi (0 = yok, 10 = tam kayıp).
businessContext_i18n.de: Subjektive Bewertung der Krankheitsschwere (0 = keine, 10 = Totalverlust).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation subjective de la sévérité de la maladie (0 = aucune, 10 = perte totale).
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación subjetiva de la severidad de enfermedades (0 = ninguna, 10 = pérdida total).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقدير شخصي لشدة المرض (0 = لا يوجد، 10 = خسارة كاملة).

rules.message: Actual yield cannot exceed expected yield. Please check input values.
Combined harvest and post-harvest loss exceeds 40%. Verify data or consider extreme conditions.
High pest and disease pressure simultaneously. Recommend integrated pest management review.

thresholds.alert: Critical yield loss detected (>30%). Immediate action required.
Harvest loss exceeds 10%. Check combine settings and operator training.
Soil quality score below 50. Consider soil amendment and conservation practices.
Equipment reliability below 60%. Schedule preventive maintenance before next season.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
